title: GuidanceEnums
description: Shared enumerations for the GuidancePlan contract. These are user-facing intent verbs and opaque coarse buckets only. They carry no proprietary tuning-signal names, values, or formulas; the server-side selection policy that assigns them is intentionally not described here.

Action.description: What the client should do with the referenced seed. A user-facing generation verb, not a signal.

CoarsePriority.description: Opaque coarse priority bucket assigned by the server. Three ordinal levels only; not client-interpretable and not derived-value-bearing.

PlanKind.description: Which guided-generation capability this plan drives.

SeedScope.description: How broadly the client is willing to let the server select seeds. 'auto' lets the private policy decide; the client never asks for a specific signal.
